title: Isla's Big Heart
synopsis: When Isla finds a lonely new student at school, she discovers that sharing kindness and making friends can fill your heart with joy. A heartwarming story about inclusion, empathy, and the magic of friendship.

pages.text: Isla loved going to school. Every morning, she would skip to the playground with her big smile. Her mommy always said, "Have a wonderful day, my sweet girl!" Isla would wave goodbye and run to meet her friends. The playground was her favorite place in the whole world.

illustration.description: Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes skipping happily toward a colorful playground filled with swings, slides, and climbing structures. Her mom waves from behind as diverse children play in the background under a bright sunny sky.
illustration.alt: Isla skipping to school playground while her mother waves goodbye

pages.text: Today felt special. The sun was shining bright, and all her friends were playing together. Maya was on the swings, laughing loudly. Tommy and Sarah were going down the big slide. Everyone was having so much fun! Isla couldn't wait to join them.

illustration.description: A vibrant playground scene with Isla, who has long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes, watching diverse children play on swings and slides. Bright primary colors fill the scene with lots of white space, showing Maya swinging, Tommy and Sarah on slides, all laughing joyfully.
illustration.alt: Children playing happily on playground equipment on a sunny day

pages.text: But then Isla saw something that made her stop. There was a boy sitting alone by the fence. He looked sad and scared. He was new to their school. Isla had never seen him before. While everyone else was playing and laughing, he sat all by himself.

illustration.description: Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes looking concerned toward a lonely boy sitting by himself near a playground fence. Other diverse children play happily in the background on swings and slides, creating a contrast between the joyful play and the boy's isolation.
illustration.alt: Isla noticing a lonely new boy sitting alone while other children play

pages.text: The new boy had his head down. He was drawing circles in the dirt with a stick. Isla's heart felt heavy when she saw him. "He must feel so lonely," she thought. "I remember my first day at school. I felt scared too." Isla knew she had to do something.

illustration.description: Close-up view of Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes looking thoughtful and empathetic, with the new boy visible in the background drawing in the dirt with a stick. The playground's bright primary colors and joyful atmosphere contrast with the boy's solitary position.
illustration.alt: Isla feeling empathy for the lonely new student

pages.text: Isla walked over slowly. "Hi," she said with her biggest, warmest smile. "I'm Isla. What's your name?" The boy looked up. His name was Alex. "I'm new here," he whispered. "I don't know anyone." Isla sat down next to him. "Well, now you know me!"

illustration.description: Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes sitting next to Alex near the playground fence, both children at ground level. Isla has a warm, welcoming smile while Alex looks shy but hopeful. The playground's bright colors and white space create an inviting, inclusive atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Isla introducing herself to Alex and sitting beside him

pages.text: Alex smiled a tiny smile. It was the first smile Isla had seen from him! "Would you like to play with me and my friends?" Isla asked. Alex nodded yes, but he still looked nervous. "Don't worry," Isla said. "My friends are really nice. They'll love meeting you!"

illustration.description: Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes extending her hand to Alex, both children standing up together. In the background, diverse children continue playing on swings and slides in the bright, sunny playground filled with primary colors and joyful energy.
illustration.alt: Isla helping Alex stand up to join the other children

pages.text: Isla took Alex's hand and led him to the swings. "Everyone, this is Alex!" she called out. Maya, Tommy, and Sarah all waved hello. "Want to swing with us?" Maya asked. Soon Alex was swinging high in the sky, laughing with pure joy!

illustration.description: All the children including Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes and Alex swinging together on the playground swings. The diverse group of kids - Maya, Tommy, and Sarah - are all laughing and swinging under the bright sunny sky, with primary colors dominating the joyful, energetic scene.
illustration.alt: All the children swinging together and laughing happily

pages.text: After swinging, they all played tag together. Alex was really fast! Then they went down the slide in a long train. "This is the best day ever!" Alex shouted. Isla felt so happy inside. Making Alex feel welcome made her heart feel full and warm.

illustration.description: The diverse group of children including Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes and Alex playing tag and going down the slide together in a happy train formation. The playground scene bursts with bright primary colors, white space, and shows all children laughing and engaging in inclusive friendship activities.
illustration.alt: Children playing tag and sliding down together in a joyful group

pages.text: When it was time to go inside, Alex ran up to Isla. "Thank you for being so kind to me," he said. "You made me feel like I belong here." Isla hugged him tight. "That's what friends do," she said. "We take care of each other."

illustration.description: Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes hugging Alex warmly while the other diverse children gather around them smiling. The playground background shows swings and slides in bright primary colors with lots of white space, creating an atmosphere of inclusive friendship and belonging.
illustration.alt: Isla and Alex hugging while their new friends smile around them

pages.text: From that day on, Alex was part of their friend group. They played together every day at recess. Isla learned that being kind and including others made everyone happier. Her mommy was so proud when she heard the story. "You have such a big, beautiful heart, Isla," she said.

illustration.description: A final playground scene showing Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes playing happily with Alex and all their diverse friends on swings, slides, and playground equipment. The bright, sunny atmosphere with primary colors and white space celebrates the joy of inclusive friendship and belonging.
illustration.alt: All the friends playing together happily on the playground

metadata.illustrationStyle: bright sunny playground, diverse kids playing, primary colors, white space, joyful energetic, inclusive, park swings slides, laughter, friendship activities

questions.question: How did Isla feel when she first saw Alex sitting alone?
questions.explanation: Isla's heart felt heavy when she saw Alex alone because she felt empathy and cared about his feelings.

questions.question: What did Alex say to Isla at the end of the day?
questions.explanation: Alex thanked Isla for being kind to him and making him feel like he belonged.

questions.question: Where was Alex sitting when Isla first saw him?
questions.explanation: Alex was sitting alone by the fence when Isla first noticed him.

questions.question: What did Isla's friends do when they met Alex?
questions.explanation: Maya, Tommy, and Sarah all waved hello to Alex when Isla introduced him.

questions.question: What did Isla learn from helping Alex?
questions.explanation: Isla learned that being kind and including others made everyone happier, including herself.
